fields.helpText: The value of this field is a pointer to the Image file (#2005). [ ... ]
The value of this field is a pointer to the DICOM Failed Images File (#2005.575).  [...]

fields.setOfCodes: NONE:Nothing to be deleted;IMAGE:Delete the Image;STUDY:Delete the Study;
fields.helpText: The value of this field is a code that indicates whether or not anything is to be deleted for this queue entry.  A value of "NONE" indicates that nothing is to be deleted. A value of "IMAGE" indicates that the image is to be deleted. A value of "STUDY" indicates that the study is to be deleted.
The value of this field is an abbreviation that identifies the instrument that is being described in this entry.   Typical abbreviations are CR1, CT2, US, etcetera.

The value of this field is a string that identifies a file. This value is the original name of the image file (directory path, filename and extension) of the image.  Files of this type are always stored in a directory called xx:\DICOM\IMAGE_IN.
